meta.site_description: We organize thoughtfully crafted trips for youth and seniors – one-day and multi-day excursions in Poland and abroad with comfortable transport and guide support.

hero.headline: Thoughtful Trips for Youth and Seniors
hero.subheadline: We organize one-day and multi-day trips, camps and group travel in Poland and abroad. We combine activity, integration, sightseeing and smooth organization from start to finish.

seniors.title: Senior Trips
seniors.description: Travel at a comfortable pace with quality transport, guide support and a program tailored to the group. We focus on culture, nature, history, local flavors and time to relax.

youth.title: Youth Trips
youth.description: We organize school trips, camps and active trips for young people. We combine education, team building, adventure and solid organization.

oneday.title: One-Day Trips
oneday.description: Perfect for schools, seniors and organized groups. Interesting program, simple transport and efficient organization.

multiday.title: Multi-Day Trips
multiday.description: Comprehensive multi-day trips with transport, accommodation, meals and guide support. We organize everything from start to finish.

trips.name: Secrets of Podlasie
trips.subtitle: 7 days of nature, history and unique places
trips.short_desc: Podlasie at a comfortable pace – an ideal trip for seniors with quality transport, accommodation, HB meals and guide support.

past_trips_section.title: Past Trips
past_trips_section.subtitle: See where we've been and what we do for our participants

trips.name: Austria, Slovenia and Czech Republic
trips.description: The trip combined relaxed sightseeing, nature and culture. The program included Landskron, eagle show, Villach, Klagenfurt, Pyramidenkogel, Finsterbach waterfall, Gerlitzen, boat cruise to Ossiach, Ljubljana, Vienna and Brno.

trips.name: Gdynia for Youth
trips.description: We organized a one-day youth trip to Gdynia combining education, history and time to relax by the sea. The program included the Emigration Museum, port walk, ORP Błyskawica and beach relaxation.

trips.name: Kayaking on Brda River
trips.description: For students of 1st High School in Bydgoszcz we organized a one-day kayaking trip on the Brda River from Opławiec to Zimne Wody Marina. After the active part, participants relaxed by the bonfire roasting sausages.

reviews_section.title: Participant Reviews
reviews_section.subtitle: See what participants say about our trips

about.title: About Us
about.text: Patent na Podróż is a travel agency born from a passion for active recreation, education and discovering characterful places. We organize trips for seniors, youth and organized groups. We care about the program, logistics, comfort and good atmosphere.

contact_section.title: Questions About a Trip?
contact_section.subtitle: Call or fill out a short form. We'll respond and help you choose the right trip for your group.
contact_section.form_gdpr: I consent to the processing of my personal data for handling this inquiry in accordance with the privacy policy.
contact_section.form_marketing: I consent to receiving information about future Patent na Podróż trips (optional).
